---
title: "Class 19: Cancer"
author: "Joseph Lo (PID: A18121493)"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)

a <- read.fasta("A18121493_mutant_seq.fa")
a

```

```{r}
conserv(a)
```

```{r}
which(conserv(a)<1)
```


```{r}
mutation.sites <- which(conserv(a)<1)
```

```{r}
a$ali[1,mutation.sites],
mutation.sites,
a$ali[2,mutation.sites]
```
